JUDGE D BALLATI; RPTR S LEE; CLK C CARSWELL CASE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. DEFT BARTOLOME VILLANUEVA IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. ATNY EUGENE VLAHOS IS PRESENT FOR THE PLTF. A CONDITIONAL SETTLEMENT IS REACHED. IF DEFT KEEPS RENT PAYMENTS CURRENT & PAYS THE UTILITY LIENS BY 8/31/96 AND PAYS $500 ATNY FEES AT $50 PER MONTH, THEN PLTF WILL FILED A DISMISSAL W PREJUDICE.IF NOT,PLTF MAY REQUEST JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AFTER GIVING DEFT 48 HRS NOTICE OF THE EX PARTE APPLICATION. THE CASE IS REMOVED FROM THE TRIAL CALENDAR OF 4/24/96.
